title: CHILD WELFARE SERVICES - 211info
text: SPRINGFIELD CHILD WELFARE CHILD WELFARE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides help in keeping families united. Finds temporary and permanent homes for kids who need them, including foster and adoptive homes. The program also teaches people how to become resource parents. 1040 Harlow Road Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 726-6644 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 726-6644 Abuse Reporting Line (855) 503-7233 Toll-free INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish and interpretation services are available as needed AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, closed major holidays TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: LTD Bus # 12, EMX Services: Adoption Services Family Preservation Programs Foster Home Placement Foster Parent/Family Recruitment Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CHILD ABUSE REPORTING MUTUAL SUPPORT - FOSTER, ADOPT, AND KINSHIP If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
